title: OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Deaf and Hard of Hearing Services (ODHHS) is a resource to improve quality of life for deaf and hard of hearing people and their families. Helps to make state services and programs welcoming and accessible, improve the user experience, and works with agencies to offer advice, resources, tools, and information. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Deaf or hard of hearing individulas and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email () (855) 503-7233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Abuse Hotlne (SAFE) (855) 503-7233 Report abuse/neglect of children or adults Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Signing, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Case/Care Management * Deafness Case/Care Management * Hard of Hearing Specialized Information and Referral * Deafness Specialized Information and Referral * Hard of Hearing Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON DISABILITIES COMMISSION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S INTENSIVE IN-HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON HOME CARE COMMISSION INFORMATION SERVICES - BRAIN INJURY PROGRAM TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - GENERAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES
